Custom Theater Banners for Stage Performances & Venue Promotion

Make the most of your next theatrical event with an eye-catching custom theater banner. From stage performances and venue promotions to cast announcements and opening night displays, we can help you improve your visibility and make an unforgettable first impression with our professionally designed theater banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a theater banner that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks.

Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of theater banner printing and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made banner for your performance venue.

If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom theater banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it for your performance dates.

Theater Banner Features:

  • Custom sizes from 1'x1' to 8'x50' for any stage or venue
  • High-resolution printing for sharp text and vibrant imagery
  • Indoor and outdoor durability options
  • Professional hemming and grommets for easy installation
  • Fast turnaround times to meet your show schedule
  • Made and printed in the USA
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Theater Banner Material for Indoor & Outdoor Stage Applications

Your theater banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

13oz Vinyl Material

Our standard 13oz vinyl material provides excellent durability for both indoor theater displays and short-term outdoor use. Perfect for lobby displays, cast announcements, and venue promotions.

Heavy-Duty 18oz Vinyl

For outdoor theater festivals, amphitheater displays, and long-term installations, our 18oz vinyl offers superior weather resistance and longevity.

Mesh Vinyl Option

Wind-resistant mesh material is ideal for outdoor theater venues where wind could affect banner stability.

Important Size Information: Exact sizes of theater banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance).

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Theater Banner Finishing Options for Stage Mounting

Hemming Options

Professional hemming on all four sides provides clean edges and prevents fraying, essential for theater banners that will be displayed prominently.

Grommet Installation

Reinforced grommets every 2 feet along the top and bottom edges allow for secure mounting to stage rigging, building facades, or banner stands.

Pole Pockets

Sewn pole pockets on top and bottom edges are perfect for hanging theater banners from stage fly systems or venue ceiling mounts.

Wind Slits

Available for outdoor theater installations to reduce wind stress and prevent banner damage during outdoor performances.

Custom Finishing

Special mounting requirements for unique theater installations can be accommodated. Contact our team for custom finishing options.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Theater Banner Production & Turnaround Times

Rush Production Available

We understand that theater schedules can be demanding. Choose from our production time options to ensure your banner arrives when you need it for your performance.

Standard Production

3-5 Business Days: Our standard production time for most theater banner orders.

Express Options

24-48 Hours: Rush production available for urgent theater banner needs (additional fees apply).

Large Format Considerations

Theater banners larger than 8 feet in both directions may require additional production time and will be folded for standard shipping.

Design Review Process

If our design team needs to make adjustments to your theater banner artwork for optimal printing, we will contact you immediately to ensure your approval before production begins.

Peak Season Notice: During busy theater seasons, production times may be extended. We recommend placing orders as early as possible.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Theater Banner Payment & Ordering Options

Secure Payment Methods

We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and business checks for theater banner orders.

Theater Company Accounts

Established theater companies can apply for net payment terms to streamline ordering for multiple productions.

Educational Discounts

Special pricing available for schools, universities, and educational theater programs.

Volume Pricing

Discounted rates available for multiple theater banner orders or recurring seasonal productions.

Custom Quote Options

For unique theater banner requirements, special sizes, or large quantity orders, request a custom quote for personalized pricing.

Secure Checkout

All transactions are processed through secure, encrypted checkout to protect your theater company's financial information.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Theater Banner Delivery

Standard Shipping

Theater banners up to 8 feet in one direction ship rolled in protective tubes to prevent creasing and damage.

Large Format Shipping

Important Notice: Due to shipping regulations, all theater banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, contact us for a custom freight quote.

Express Delivery

Overnight and 2-day shipping options available for urgent theater banner deliveries to meet performance deadlines.

Venue Direct Shipping

Ship theater banners directly to your performance venue, theater, or installation location.

Freight Options

Large theater banner orders or multiple banners can be shipped via freight for cost-effective delivery.

International Shipping

Theater banner shipping available to international venues and touring productions.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Indoor & Outdoor Stage Uses for Theater Banners

Performance Venue Displays

Promote current and upcoming shows with eye-catching theater banners displayed on building facades, in lobbies, and at venue entrances.

Stage Backdrop Elements

Large format theater banners can serve as scenic elements or backdrop components for stage productions.

Outdoor Theater Festivals

Weather-resistant theater banners are perfect for outdoor amphitheaters, Shakespeare in the park events, and summer theater festivals.

Cast and Crew Recognition

Highlight featured performers, directors, and sponsors with professional theater banners for opening nights and special events.

Educational Theater Programs

School and university theater departments use custom banners for student productions, drama club promotions, and theater program marketing.

Touring Productions

Portable theater banners are essential for traveling shows, providing consistent branding across multiple venues.

Theater Company Branding

Build recognition for your theater company with branded banners featuring logos, season announcements, and contact information.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Theater Banner Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

File Format Requirements

Submit theater banner artwork in high-resolution PDF, AI, EPS, or PSD formats for best printing results.

Resolution Guidelines

Minimum 150 DPI at final theater banner size for sharp, professional printing quality.

Color Mode

Submit artwork in CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction on your theater banner.

Text Considerations

Use fonts sized appropriately for viewing distance. Theater banners displayed from far distances need larger text for readability.

Bleed Requirements

Include 0.125" bleed on all sides of your theater banner artwork to ensure complete coverage after trimming.

Design Services Available

Our professional designers can create custom theater banner artwork from your concepts, photos, and text content.

Proof Approval

Digital proofs are provided for all theater banner orders to ensure artwork meets your expectations before printing begins.

Image Quality

Photos and images should be high-resolution to maintain quality when printed at theater banner size.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Theater Banners for Your Next Performance

Ready to make your theater production stand out? Our custom theater banners combine professional-grade materials with expert printing to create stunning displays that capture audience attention and promote your performances effectively.

Why Choose Banners.com for Your Theater Banners?

  • Expert Design Support: Our experienced graphic designers understand theater marketing and can help bring your vision to life
  • Fast Turnaround: Rush production options available to meet tight performance schedules
  • Quality Guarantee: Every theater banner undergoes strict quality checks before shipping
  • Custom Sizing: From intimate black box theaters to grand outdoor amphitheaters, we print any size you need
  • Durable Materials: Weather-resistant options for outdoor venues and long-lasting indoor displays

Get Started Today: Upload your theater banner artwork using our easy online system, or let our design team create something spectacular for your production. With sizes from 1'x1' to 8'x50' and unlimited customization options, we'll help you create the perfect theater banner for your venue and audience.

Questions about your theater banner project? Call our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for expert guidance on materials, sizing, and design options. We're here to ensure your theater banner exceeds expectations and helps make your production a success.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Theater Banners

What size theater banner should I order for my venue?

Theater banner size depends on your venue and viewing distance. For outdoor theaters, larger banners (6'x3' or bigger) work best. Indoor lobbies typically use 4'x2' to 8'x4' banners. Our team can help you determine the ideal size for maximum impact.

Can theater banners withstand outdoor weather?

Yes, our vinyl theater banners are designed for outdoor use and can withstand rain, wind, and UV exposure. For extended outdoor display, we recommend our heavy-duty 18oz vinyl material.

How long do theater banners take to produce?

Standard production time is 3-5 business days. Rush options of 24-48 hours are available for urgent theater banner needs with additional fees.

Do you offer design services for theater banners?

Yes, our professional graphic designers can create custom theater banner artwork from your text, images, and concepts. Design services are available for an additional fee.

What's the best way to hang a theater banner?

This depends on your venue. Grommets work well for outdoor installations, while pole pockets are ideal for indoor hanging systems. We can add custom finishing options to match your specific mounting requirements.

Can I reuse my theater banner for multiple productions?

Absolutely! High-quality vinyl theater banners are durable enough for multiple uses. Many theater companies create seasonal banners or reusable company branding banners.

What if my theater banner arrives damaged?

We guarantee your satisfaction. If your theater banner arrives damaged or doesn't meet our quality standards, we'll reprint it at no charge.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
